$comment: Coverage thresholds for quality-zero-platform (Python control plane). Enforces strict 100% line+branch on scripts/quality/rollup_v2 via pyproject.toml [tool.coverage] (introduced in PR 2 of feat/quality-rollup-v2). PR 4 expands source scope to full tree.

enforcement.command: python -m coverage run -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py' && python -m coverage xml -o coverage.xml && python scripts/quality/assert_coverage_100.py --report coverage.xml
enforcement.description: Orchestrator agents MUST check coverage against these thresholds before marking any task complete or creating a PR. Blocking enforced since QRv2 PR 2.
